title: Matera's US Debut Seeks to Duplicate Brazil's Instant Payment, QR Code Success
excerpt: With immense amounts of popularity in Brazil with Pix Instant Payments, Matera looks to continue its success by debuting its operations in the US.
body:
With immense amounts of popularity in Brazil with Pix Instant Payments, Matera looks to continue its success by debuting its operations now in the United States.

Read the full article [here](https://www.pymnts.com/fraud-prevention/2022/instant-payments-forces-banks-to-put-fraud-prevention-at-the-forefront/).
